request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for defense systems is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a major European ally had to delay critical drone deployments because of supply chain issues with a single overseas supplier. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring we can protect ourselves when global tensions rise. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
